description_long: This sculpture depicts a roughly textured, abstract figure with wings, standing upright on a rectangular brick pedestal. The figure appears to be humanoid, with discernible head, torso, and arms, but the details are heavily stylized and irregular, giving it a weathered, almost eroded appearance. The wings are prominent and extend from the back, adding a sense of movement and ethereal quality to the piece. The brick base is solid and rectangular, with visible mortar lines and some surface wear, suggesting outdoor exposure. The entire sculpture is predominantly a pale, off-white color, contrasting with the reddish-brown and gray tones of the brick base. The overall impression is of a small angelic or mythical figure, possibly intended as a decorative or commemorative urban feature.
description: A rough-textured, winged humanoid figure stands atop a rectangular brick pedestal, with an abstract, weathered appearance and pale coloration.
description_view_0: The left side of the winged figure is visible, showing the rough texture of the wings and the brick base's surface details.
description_view_1: The front of the sculpture reveals the figure's face, chest, and both wings, with the brick base clearly supporting the figure.
description_view_2: The right side of the figure is shown, highlighting the irregular surface of the wings and the brickwork of the pedestal.
description_view_3: The back of the sculpture displays the full span of the wings and the rear of the figure, with the brick base extending outward.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a brick base, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
